expectations.text: Explains disappeared as a missing task slot rather than a simple exit result
expectations.evidence: Treats the event as the task/window no longer being present in the shared session, not just an exit code.

expectations.text: Lists plausible causes such as kill, replace, or session/task removal
expectations.evidence: Mentions kill, replace, session reset, and accidental removal scenarios.

expectations.text: Explains how to judge whether the disappearance was expected
expectations.evidence: Tells the reader to check whether the removal was intentional and whether the task should still exist.

expectations.text: Makes the higher-level task meaning clear even if low-level window mechanics are mentioned
expectations.evidence: Although it uses tmux vocabulary, it still explains the disappearance in terms of the tracked background task no longer being present.
